claims.expectedText: Adults aged 20 years or older who self-reported no prior diabetes diagnosis and had available HbA1c data were included.
sourceFields: Self-reported no diabetes and HbA1c available
claims.interpretationBoundary: analytic eligibility criteria for this NHANES cross-sectional sample, not a target-population denominator

claims.expectedText: A fasting-subsample sensitivity definition used HbA1c >=6.5% or fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dL.
sourceFields: HbA1c or fasting glucose-defined undiagnosed diabetes in fasting subsample
claims.interpretationBoundary: fasting-subsample sensitivity definition, not the primary outcome definition or a clinical diagnostic rule

claims.expectedText: NHANES provides demographic data, anthropometry, blood pressure, health questionnaires, and laboratory measures, including glycohemoglobin and fasting glucose in the 2017-2018 cycle.
claims.interpretationBoundary: source-data scope statement for the NHANES 2017-2018 example; component availability does not imply complete data for every participant
